## Checklist
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md) (the CLA bot will also prompt on your first PR)
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change; engine tests pass with **no game project present**
- [ ] The change is focused and matches the surrounding code style
